translation.example.comment-colors: Print each letter with a different color
translation.tool.save: Save the current file to your connected device
translation.tool.run: Run the current Python file on the device. Click again to stop.
translation.tool.conn.ws: Connect over WebREPL (WebSocket). Advanced — usually USB is what you want.
translation.tool.conn.ble: Connect over Bluetooth LE. Advanced — usually USB is what you want.
translation.tool.conn.usb: Connect a Jumperless or other MicroPython device over USB. Click again to disconnect.
translation.tool.clear: Clear the terminal scrollback (does not affect the device)
translation.about.cta: ViperIDE – MicroPython / CircuitPython IDE in the browser.
